summary: Completed end-to-end testing of the new daily streak system on the live preview URL. Backend: added 7 streak-specific pytest tests to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — all 7 PASSED. Full regression (20 tests) is 19/20 passing; the single failure (TestJarCapacity) is a pre-existing seed-data pollution issue (non-TEST_ active tasks occupy jar capacity on shared preview env) — NOT related to the streak feature. Frontend: Playwright verified HUD streak-display shows current=1 with flame icon carrying `zenith-fire-icon` animation class, hover tooltip renders '1-day shipping streak! Best ever: 1 days', Save-the-Day modal opens with both tabs (tab-day-poster, tab-streak-card), day poster canvas renders at 1200x630 with streak badge logic, streak card canvas renders at 1080x1080 with drawn fire symbol + streak number + stats line + date (pixel sample at center is non-blank confirming draw), download-poster-btn visible on day tab, download-streak-btn visible on streak tab, and the HUD streak value correctly re-fetches after shipping a task via the UI (addTask + ship + Promise.all([/api/session, /api/streak])).

issues: Grammar: tooltip shows 'Best ever: 1 days' — should be singular 'day' when best_ever === 1. See HUD.jsx line 67. Minor cosmetic.
Line 215 has `streakNum === 1 ? 'DAY STREAK' : 'DAY STREAK'` — both branches are identical, suggesting an unfinished pluralization. Harmless today but dead code.

action_items: (Optional, cosmetic) Fix HUD tooltip grammar: use 'day' when best_ever===1, else 'days' (HUD.jsx line 67).
(Optional, code hygiene) Remove dead ternary in ReplayModal.jsx line 215 or pluralize label based on streakNum.

(Pre-existing, unrelated to streak) TestJarCapacity::test_jar_overflow_returns_400 fails in shared preview because non-TEST_ unshipped tasks occupy jar space. Either (a) make the test clean ALL today's unshipped tasks (not just TEST_-prefixed) before it runs, or (b) accept that jar overflow is already enforced at API level and is verified elsewhere.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py calculate_streak(): only persists best_streak when streak>0. If best_ever already exists in db.stats and current temporarily equals 0 (e.g. early morning before threshold met), that's fine due to $max, but the endpoint already guards with `max(best, current_streak)` — good defensive layering.
server.py get_streak(): when today qualifies, `streak_at_risk` is computed but then returned as 0 — the prev_streak loop still executes unnecessarily. Minor perf; correct output.

ReplayModal.jsx useEffect (lines 13-21): depends on [session, shippedTasks, streak] but re-mounts the timer each change — acceptable because redraw is cheap. The 50ms setTimeout relies on Dialog portal timing; consider useLayoutEffect + ref ready guard for robustness, but current behavior tests green.
HUD.jsx: streak-display data-testid wraps TooltipTrigger asChild div — tooltip hover detection worked correctly in tests.

useGameState.js: fetchStreak is declared but never returned from the hook; only used internally in useEffect and shipTask. This is fine but worth exporting if future flows (e.g. delete task reverting ship) need manual refetch.

success_rate.backend: 100% on new streak endpoint (7/7). 19/20 overall; 1 unrelated pre-existing failure.
success_rate.frontend: 100% of streak flows verified (HUD display, fire animation class, tooltip, modal tabs, canvas dimensions 1200x630 + 1080x1080, download buttons, refetch-after-ship).

seed_data_creation: One TEST_streak_ship sand task was created + shipped via backend test; TEST_streak_ship_ui sand task created + shipped via UI test. Both are cleaned by subsequent test runs' autouse fixture (TEST_ prefix filter).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streak system is fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/streak returns all 7 expected fields with correct types and semantics (today_ships matches session.score_you, today_qualifies == ships>=3, best_ever >= current, threshold=3). Frontend HUD streak-display + tooltip + fire animation class + modal tabs + 1080x1080 streak card + 1200x630 day poster all render and integrate correctly. The Dialog-portal 50ms delay for canvas draw works reliably. Key testids used: streak-display, streak-display .zenith-hud-stat-value, save-day-btn, replay-modal, tab-day-poster, tab-streak-card, poster-canvas, streak-canvas, download-poster-btn, download-streak-btn. Streak refetches via /api/streak after shipTask() Promise.all — confirmed in useGameState.js.
rca of the issue: N/A - no blocking bugs. Two cosmetic nitpicks on singular/plural 'day/days' grammar (HUD tooltip line 67 and ReplayModal streak card line 215) are low priority. Pre-existing TestJarCapacity flakiness is due to shared preview DB retaining non-TEST_ unshipped tasks between runs.
